title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $63K as Micron stock eyes 10% drop in US chip sell-off
summary: Bitcoin came off two-week highs while US stocks dipped and John Bollinger described BTC price action as "at a critical point."

title: Bitcoin Covenants Part 3: SIGHASH_ANYPREVOUT
summary: APO lets a Bitcoin signature authorize any compatible UTXO rather than one fixed outpoint. It allows for rebindable pre-signed transactions for Lightning, vaults, and layer-2 protocols without new key management overhead.

title: Nasdaq 100 Falls 2% in Chip-Led Rout as Oil Climbs: Markets Wrap
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down the stock market on concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations after a breakneck surge from war-driven lows.

title: Why Hedge Funds Posted Such a Strong First Half
summary: Hedge funds posted a strong first half with Lone Pine Capital posting a 43% gain and David Tepper’s Appaloosa Management returning 32%. Sridhar Natarajan has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tether Invests $20 Million in Brazil’s Mercado Bitcoin
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Tether Invests $20 Million in Brazil’s Mercado Bitcoin
Tether invested $20 million in Brazil's Mercado Bitcoin to expand regulated blockchain finance, tokenization and stablecoin infrastructure across Latin America.

title: Coinbase Wins UK License to Offer Stocks and Derivatives Alongside Crypto
summary: The FCA authorization lets the exchange offer equities and derivatives to UK users, a step toward its "everything exchange" ambitions.

title: Morning Minute: Strategy Turns Net Seller
summary: Michael Saylor becomes a major Bitcoin seller. A memecoin gets "exploited" via governance. And Bernstein doubles down on a $150k BTC call.

title: SEC plans crypto rule changes for exchanges and broker dealers in 2026 regulatory agenda
summary: The SEC is laying the groundwork for cryptocurrency rule changes before the end of the year, with a blueprint for exchanges and brokers.

title: 1kx, Blockchain Capital back $7.5 million KOR Protocol Series A at $100 million valuation
summary: KOR Protocol is building an onchain clearinghouse that helps register and route creative works and pay out rights holders.

title: French far-right leader Le Pen cleared to run for president
summary: Appeals court shortens sentence for embezzlement but she must now decide whether to run

title: Trump signals reversal of Turkey F-35 ban
summary: US president strikes friendlier tone with Turkish counterpart than Nato allies
